diagnostics.message: Contradiction detection currently covers direct cardinality conflicts and datatype-versus-object-reference conflicts only.
Import resolution currently follows explicit owl:imports links only.
Release-1 metric formulas use total property shapes as the denominator for property-based shares and total shapes for shape-based counts.
